app_metadata.description: A fast and modern WebUI for a BorgBackup's central repository server.
app_metadata.name: borgwarehouse

run_as_context.description: Container [borgwarehouse] runs as non-root user and group.
Container [cron] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: BorgWarehouse

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication
None

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication

attrs.label: Networks
attrs.description: The docker networks to join

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

enum.description: borgwarehouse
cron

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.

attrs.label: Interface Name (Optional)
attrs.description: The network interface name to use for this network

attrs.label: MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service’s containers to its networks.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)
SMB/CIFS Share (Mounts a volume to a SMB share)
NFS Share (Mounts a volume to a NFS share)

1.0.2.readme:
BorgWarehouse

BorgWarehouse is a fast and modern WebUI for a BorgBackup's central repository server.
